recalls.Description: Lifetime Brands has announced a recall of its BUILT LUUM light up tumblers, which come in 16 oz. and 18 oz. sizes. These tumblers feature a bottom compartment housing an LED light powered by a button cell battery. The tumblers are available in various festive designs for winter holidays and the Fourth of July. Specific theme names and item numbers are printed on the bottom label or hangtag of each tumbler.
recalls.Title: Lifetime Brands Issues Recall for BUILT LUUM Light Up Tumblers Due to Choking and Battery Ingestion Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Lifetime Brands at 888-561-2269 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email Recall@Builtny.com, or visit https://www.builtny.com/pages/recall for further details.

"lumm," the tumbler's theme name, item number and UPC code are printed on a label located on the tumblers' underside or hangtag

Injuries.Name: Lifetime Brands has received one report of a child gaining access to the tumbler's button cell battery and putting it in the mouth. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Kroger, Hy-Vee, Meijer, Nordstrom Rack, and Winn-Dixie stores across the country, as well as online at Builtny.com from October 2024 through December 2025, priced between $10 and $15.

Importers.Name: Lifetime Brands, Inc., owner of the BUILT brand, of Garden City, New York

Hazards.Name: The LED tumblers may break, exposing button cell batteries that pose choking and ingestion hazards to children. Swallowing these batteries can lead to severe injuries, internal chemical burns, or even death.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the tumblers immediately, keep them out of children's reach, and dispose of the battery safely. To obtain a full refund, contact Lifetime Brands and complete a Product Recall Refund Form at https://www.builtny.com/pages/recall, including a photo of the disposed product. Note: Button cell batteries are hazardous and should be disposed of according to local hazardous waste guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: Lifetime Brands recalls BUILT LUUM light up tumblers due to choking and battery ingestion hazards. Learn how to get a refund.
